vBRIEFInfo.description: Story vBRIEF for swarm work targeting #1342

plan.title: swarm: unify Phase 6 sub-agent spawning + tests/refactor (slices 4+5 of #1342)

narratives.Overview: Unify sub-agent spawning for review-cycle pollers behind the platform adapter. Complete tests, refactor, and documentation updates.
narratives.ProblemStatement: See GitHub issue #1342 for full context and TDD plan.
narratives.Goals: Implement the assigned slice(s) from the TDD plan in #1342 using the hybrid workaround approach.
narratives.UserStories: As a user of Grok Build, I want the swarm skill to support non-Warp environments natively.

items: Make Phase 6 poller spawning use detected platform mechanism
Add comprehensive tests for new platform paths
Extract shared runtime adapter if beneficial
Update anti-patterns, prompt examples, and workaround section
